name: Protein Graham Crust
description: Reusable cheesecake crust — graham crumbs bound with egg white + a little melted butter, lightly sweetened, par-baked. Egg-white bound so it sets firm at minimal fat (the binding that tested well on the turtle). This is the base crust a cheesecake composes in; skip it for a crustless cheesecake, or fork it for a flavored version. Sub-recipe (1 batch ~= 305 cal, presses a 9-inch bottom).

steps.instructionText: Stir the graham crumbs, Splenda, and salt together. Work in the melted butter and egg white until it clumps like wet sand, then press firmly into the bottom of a parchment-lined 9-inch pan — run the parchment up two opposite sides as a sling so you can lift the whole cake out later. Bake at 350F for ~10 min, then cool while you finish the filling.
